blocks.text:
All support is volunteer-run. To make it easier for people to help, it's best if you could provide more information about your computer or issue. 
Please provide relevant computer information such as your CPU, Graphics Card, and Operating System.
Additionally, please include any other information that could help. If this is Air Link or Virtual Desktop related, your network setup (such as router model) is useful, and noting whether you're wired can help too.

[You can also contact Meta before reaching out to the community for help.](https://www.meta.com/help/support/?b=quest)
